items.content_html: HT++ is a statically-typed programming language that transpiles to C++. It features an AutoHotkey-like syntax with static types, blending ease of use with C++'s performance. This allows for the development of efficient and versatile scripts that can run on any device where C++ is supported, ensuring compatibility across every platform.
items.title: TheMaster1127/HT-plus-plus: HT++ is a statically-typed programming language that transpiles to C++. It features an AutoHotkey-like syntax with static types, blending ease of use with C++'s performance. This allows for the development of efficient and versatile scripts that can run on any device where C++ is supported, ensuring compatibility across every platform.

items.content_html: For Windows/Linux dvorak users! Built for Windows (ahk-v2), Linux (v1.0) & Win-XP (v1.1). There's LockWorkStation (RWIN), rename (!r), explorer (!e), duplicate (^d), Dvorak toggle (!^+d), transparency (^t), AlwaysOnTop (^SPACE), suspend (!^SPACE), TitleBar toggle (F12), grip (^F12), window-list (F11) & ControlList (^F11).
items.title: TinosNitso/AutoHotkey: For Windows/Linux dvorak users! Built for Windows (ahk-v2), Linux (v1.0) & Win-XP (v1.1).  There's LockWorkStation (RWIN), rename (!r), explorer (!e), duplicate (^d), Dvorak toggle (!^+d), transparency (^t), AlwaysOnTop (^SPACE), suspend (!^SPACE), TitleBar toggle (F12), grip (^F12), window-list (F11) & ControlList (^F11).
